title: Configure stdio MCP server for local database
prompt: Set up an MCP server for my PostgreSQL database
expected_behavior: Creates stdio MCP config using npx @modelcontextprotocol/server-postgres with ${DATABASE_URL} env var. Checks for existing servers first, validates name uniqueness, uses kebab-case name.

title: Configure HTTP MCP server for remote API
prompt: Connect Claude to our analytics API at https://api.analytics.com/mcp
expected_behavior: Creates HTTP transport config with the provided URL, uses ${API_TOKEN} for auth (never hardcoded), saves to appropriate scope.

title: Server name already exists
prompt: Add an MCP server called postgres for my new database
expected_behavior: Checks existing servers via 'claude mcp list', detects name collision with existing 'postgres' server, suggests alternative name or confirms replacement.

title: User requests deprecated SSE transport
prompt: Set up an SSE MCP server for my remote tool
expected_behavior: Warns that SSE transport is deprecated, recommends HTTP transport instead, configures with HTTP if user agrees.

title: False positive — one-off API call
prompt: Make a quick curl request to check if our API is up
expected_behavior: Does NOT activate this skill. Recognizes this is a one-off API call better served by Bash with curl, not an MCP server configuration.
